expectations.text: Output uses the implementation summary format (not the worker handoff or closeout format)
expectations.evidence: Header reads '## Implementation Summary' and follows Format 1 fields.

expectations.text: All 7 fields appear in order: Process Used, Execution Context, Task Scope, Implementation Outcome, Behavioral Impact, Risks/Gaps, File Reference Summary, Governance Status
expectations.evidence: All 8 named fields appear in the listed order; an additional 'Quality gate results' line is interleaved before Governance Status but does not break the order of the 8 required fields.
'Task Scope: task-101 — Add a paginated admin user listing endpoint...'

expectations.text: Implementation Outcome includes the active branch (feature/task-101-admin-users) and the integration target (develop)
expectations.evidence: 'Active branch: feature/task-101-admin-users' and 'Integration target: develop' under Implementation Outcome.

expectations.text: Quality gate results are concrete (8 unit tests passing, typecheck clean, lint clean) — not vague claims like 'all gates passed'
expectations.evidence: 'Quality gate results: 8/8 unit tests passing, typecheck clean, lint clean.'

expectations.text: Governance Status indicates the work is awaiting code review (pre-commit; commit/push haven't happened yet)
expectations.evidence: 'Governance Status: Pre-commit. Awaiting code review. Commit and push have not happened yet; no merge to develop yet.'

expectations.text: File Reference Summary names the 4 files changed without dumping a full changelog
expectations.evidence: Lists exactly the 4 files: api/routes/admin.py, api/auth.py, api/schemas/user_out.py, tests/api/test_admin_users.py.

expectations.text: Output does not cite this skill by name (no 'task-handoff-summaries', 'this skill', 'as required')
expectations.evidence: No mention of the skill name or self-reference in the output.

expectations.text: Output does not falsely claim commit, push, or merge happened (those steps haven't run yet)
expectations.evidence: Governance Status explicitly states commit and push have not happened and no merge has occurred.
